columns.extraction_plan: Reviewed abstract, methods, results, discussion sections (Chunks 8, 9, 10), appendix tables and figures (Chunks 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 12). The document is an original research report of a randomized controlled trial (ARASENS), not a systematic review or meta-analysis that would provide an overall risk judgment of individual criteria of evidence across multiple randomized controlled trials. The paper focuses on reporting the efficacy and safety outcomes of the ARASENS trial itself.
